doss_handeye.evidence: Retrieved 14 addressed KNOCK packets and verified cockpit F_HARVEY_STATION_IDENTITY_AND_BOOTSTRAP_20260713 with 13 artifacts on DOSS

truth_boundary: The station packet is publicly retrievable without Ben carrying text.
The inline adapter is receiver-proven without network or local-file approval.
The one terminal receiver executed on Doss; it is not Betsy-local proof.
Betsy, Spanzee, Medullina, and Sally still lack live Handeye heartbeats, so Harvey has no remote-machine execution channel to them yet.
A LAN listener and firewall rule do not count as second-machine reachability until a receiver on another physical machine returns proof.
